DOMTextRun.characters: Turn on Kid Mode to eliminate all potentially hazardous
chemicals from the app to protect young kids from attempting
the same experiment in real life.
内接触到危险的化学药剂。
內接觸到危險的化學藥劑。
」を起動し、アプリに含まれる化学成分による
危険からお子様を保護することができる。
Turn on Kid Mode to eliminate all potentially hazardous
chemicals from the app to protect young kids from attempting
the same experiment in real life.
Activez le Mode Enfants pour éliminer tous les possibles éléments
chimiques dangereux de l'application pour empêcher les enfants
essayer de reproduire les mêmes expériences danvs la vie réelle.
Turn on Kid Mode to eliminate all potentially hazardous
chemicals from the app to protect young kids from attempting
the same experiment in real life.
Turn on Kid Mode to eliminate all potentially hazardous
chemicals from the app to protect young kids from attempting
the same experiment in real life.
Activa el Modo Niños para eliminar todos los posibles elementos
químicos peligrosos de la aplicación para evitar que los niños
intenten reproducir el mismo experimentos en la vida real.
Turn on Kid Mode to eliminate all potentially hazardous
chemicals from the app to protect young kids from attempting
the same experiment in real life.
Schalten Sie den Kid Mode an, um alle möglichen Gefahren
von giftigen Chemikalien von der Anwendung zu vermeiden,
damit junge Kinder davon abgehalten werden, das gleiche
Attiva Kid Mode per rimuovere dall'applicazione tutte le
sostanze chimiche potenzialmente pericolose. Proteggi i tuoi
bambini evitando loro di replicare lo stesso esperimento nella
Sätt på barnsäkert läge för att eliminera alla de potentiellt
farliga kemikalierna från appen för att skydda unga barn
från att försöka sig på samma experiment i verkliga livet
